interactions.result: Create signed local session and load projects
interactions.error: Show the server error and retain the entered value only in component memory

interactions.result: Reveal the inline project form and focus its name field
interactions.error: No state change

interactions.result: Set the active project and clear stale workflow detail
interactions.error: Keep the previous project active

interactions.result: Create an outcome and dependency graph through sequential API mutations
interactions.error: Name the failed stage and preserve entered fields

interactions.result: Move the workflow to running and refresh all related resources
interactions.error: Render the typed API error beside the control

interactions.result: Execute exactly one ready work item and refresh
interactions.error: Explain when no ready item exists

interactions.result: Open the inspector with that item as context
interactions.error: No state change

interactions.result: Approve the selected effect once and refresh budget/effects
interactions.error: Keep the effect waiting and show the typed error

interactions.result: Close the inspector and return focus to its trigger
interactions.error: No state change

interactions.result: Reload the active resources without creating a mutation
interactions.error: Keep the last good data and announce stale state

interactions.result: Switch the active project canvas without changing durable state
interactions.error: Keep the current view

interactions.control: Pause, resume, cancel, or stop effects
interactions.result: Apply the selected server-authorized workflow control
interactions.error: Keep the last durable workflow state and show the typed error

interactions.result: Record one durable rejection, release reservation, and fail the affected run
interactions.error: Keep the effect waiting and show the typed error

interactions.result: Persist a non-negative project limit through the API
interactions.error: Retain the prior committed budget

interactions.result: Create an owner-controlled project team
interactions.error: Retain the entered name and show the typed error

interactions.result: Persist only an environment or keyring credential reference
interactions.error: Never fall back to accepting a credential value

interactions.result: Record an evidence-bearing shadow decision without execution
interactions.error: Do not execute on evaluation failure

interactions.result: Persist scoped content with server-owned provenance
interactions.error: Do not treat unsaved content as durable

interactions.result: Return firewall-wrapped untrusted context
interactions.error: Do not return authority-bearing fallback text

interactions.result: Create a versioned skill and activate that exact version
interactions.error: Do not create a routine from a draft skill

interactions.result: Bind a routine to an active skill version
interactions.error: Keep the prior routine list

interactions.result: Create an authorized routine run record
interactions.error: Do not report a successful run locally
